hook.text: RASHFORD INJURY SCARE BEFORE GHANA CLASH

beats.text: RASHFORD HAS HAMSTRING TIGHTNESS AFTER CROATIA GOAL
TUCHEL LISTS RASHFORD DOUBTFUL FOR GHANA CLASH
SAKA AND RICE ALSO NURSING FITNESS ISSUES
RASHFORD'S UNITED FUTURE MAY HINGE ON WORLD CUP FORM

caption: Marcus Rashford's World Cup campaign is under a cloud after developing hamstring tightness against Croatia 🔴 He came off the bench to score England's fourth goal in a 4-2 win — but the effort may have cost him. Thomas Tuchel has listed him as doubtful for the crucial Group C clash with Ghana. Saka and Rice are also nursing injuries, leaving England with a real fitness headache. The stakes couldn't be higher: Rashford's summer at United hinges on proving his fitness and form on the biggest stage. Will Rashford be fit for Ghana? 👇 REPORTED — per Sky Sports. #mufc #manutd #premierleague #football #worldcup #england #rashford
